meaning: n.醉鬼,酗酒者vt.因酗酒浪而费掉vi.嗜酒
examples: After SOT The days of cheap, low quality, mass-produced German wines are numbered.
After SOT If they can deliver tonight, a quarter-final place awaits for el Nino and his amigos.
These amplifiers are available in small package options (SOT-23) as well as the MSOP and the industry-standard SO packages.
The thriving border trade at the town of Mae Sot dried up three months ago.
According to activists in Mae Sot, the next three days witnessed the rounding up and expulsion of 1, 500 migrant workers.
